core_skills: Software Engineering, System Design, Application Development, Testing, Operational Stability
skill_match_scores: Software Engineering:1.0, System Design:1.0, Application Development:0.0, Testing:1.0, Operational Stability:0.0
must_have_quals: Formal training or certification on software engineering concepts and 3+ years' applied experience, Hands-on practical experience in system design, application development, testing, and ensuring operational stability, Experience with front-end technology React, Proficiency in developing RESTful APIs using Python Fast API, Experience with version control systems, particularly GIT, Strong knowledge of SQL and experience in database design and development, Solid understanding of agile methodologies such as CI/CD, Application Resiliency, and Security, Demonstrated knowledge of software applications and technical processes within a technical discipline (e.g., cloud, artificial intelligence, machine learning, mobile, etc.), Experience with application monitoring and creating dashboards using Splunk, Grafana, and Datadog
preferred_quals: Familiarity with cloud platforms, such as Cloud Foundry, Strong communication skills and a willingness to learn
core_responsibilities: Develop and maintain backend services using Python, Collaborate with the front-end team to integrate ReactJS applications, Work with SQL databases to design, query, and manage data, Assist in the development and maintenance of applications using .NET, Participate in code reviews and contribute to team knowledge sharing, Stay updated with the latest industry trends and technologies
job_summary: A-V Services Inc. is a leading AV company with multiple fortune 100 contracts within the financial, pharmaceutical, and computing industry, seeking a Software Engineer II. The role involves designing and delivering technology products, implementing solutions across diverse technical domains, and supporting various business functions to achieve strategic goals.
